Overflow\\\",\\n            \\\"*/\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\",\\n            \\\"$0\\\",\\n            \\\"void solve() {\\\",\\n            \\\"}\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\",\\n            \\\"int main() {\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\\tios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\\tcin.tie(NULL);\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\\tint T=1;\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\\tcin >> T;\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\\twhile (T--)\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\\t\\\\tsolve();\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\\treturn 0;\\\",\\n            \\\"}\\\",\\n        ],\\n        \\\"description\\\": \\\"Template for doing CP\\\",\\n    },\\n    \\\"Debug\\\": {\\n        \\\"prefix\\\": \\\"dbg\\\",\\n        \\\"body\\\": [\\n            \\\"template<typename A, typename B> ostream& operator<<(ostream &os, const pair<A, B> &p) { return os << '(' << p.first << \\\\\\\",\\\\\\\" << p.second << ')'; }\\\",\\n            \\\"template<typename X,typename T=typename enable_if<!is_same<X,string>::value,typename X::value_type>::type>ostream& operator<<(ostream &o,const X &v){o<<'{';string s;for(const T &x:v)o<<s<<x,s=\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\";return o<<'}';}\\\",\\n            \\\"void _dbg() { cerr << endl; }\\\",\\n            \\\"template<typename Head, typename... T) { cerr << ' ' << H; _dbg(T...); }\\\",\\n            \\\"#ifdef LOCAL\\\",\\n            \\\"#define dbg(...) cerr << \\\\\\\"[\\\\\\\" << #__VA_ARGS__ << \\\\\\\"]:\\\\\\\", _dbg(__VA_ARGS__)\\\",\\n            \\\"#else\\\",\\n            \\\"#define dbg(...)\\\",\\n            \\\"#endif\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\",\\n        ],\\n        \\\"description\\\": \\\"Adds debug statements\\\"\\n    },\\n    \\\"CP Template-Google Code Jam\\\": {\\n        \\\"prefix\\\": \\\"gcj\\\",\\n        \\\"body\\\": [\\n            \\\"#include <bits/stdc++.h>\\\",\\n            \\\"using namespace std;\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\",\\n            \\\"typedef long long ll;\\\",\\n            \\\"typedef pair<int, int> pii;\\\",\\n            \\\"template<class T>\\\",\\n            \\\"using v = std::vector<T>;\\\",\\n            \\\"\\\",\\n            \\\"#define  endl \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\"\\\",\\n            \\\"#define  FOR(i, a, n) for (ll i = a; i <= n; i++)\\\",\\n            \\\"#define  ROF(i, a, n) for (ll i = a; i >= n; i--)\\\",\\n            \\\"#define  all(x) (x).begin()+1, (x).end()\\\",\\n            \\\"#define  All(x) (x).begin(), (x).end()\\\",\\n            \\\"/*\\\",\\n            \\\"Before you start coding did you check corner cases?\\\",\\n            \\\"Remember 1 mistake = 10 mins. Taking 9 mins and checking is always better\\\",\\n            \\\"Ex: 1. In NxM, N/M = 1,\\\",\\n            \\\"    2. (n*(n+1))/2 instead of n*(n+1)/2,\\\",\\n            \\\"    3. Each snippet is defined under a snippet name and has a prefix, body and \\n    // description. The prefix is what is used to trigger the snippet and the body will be expanded and inserted. Possible variables are:\\n    // $1, $2 for tab stops, $0 for the final cursor position, and ${1:label}, ${2:another} for placeholders. Placeholders with the \\n    // same ids are connected.\\n    // Example:\\n    // \\\"Print to console\\\": {\\n    // \\t\\\"prefix\\\": \\\"log\\\",\\n    // \\t\\\"body\\\": [\\n    // \\t\\t\\\"console.log('$1');\\\",\\n    // \\t\\t\\\"$2\\\"\\n    // \\t],\\n    // \\t\\\"description\\\": \\\"Log output to console\\\"\\n    // }\"}"}
